description: AGENTS.md fails ruff format --check because markdown formatting is experimental in ruff preview mode. Affects all phases that run ruff format on AGENTS.md.
risk: Low for DG scope. Does not affect Python code quality or governance semantics.
follow_up: Tooling hygiene phase when ruff stabilizes markdown formatting support.
evidence: ruff format --check AGENTS.md exit code 2: 'Markdown formatting is experimental, enable preview mode.'
notes: Pre-existing across all DG phases. Not a governance or code quality issue.

description: .coveragerc is untracked residue from a previous phase. It is present in the working tree but never staged or committed.
risk: Medium — untracked files accumulate, may accidentally be committed via blind git add. Currently excluded from all commits.
follow_up: Tooling residue triage phase — decide to commit with justification or delete.
evidence: git status shows .coveragerc as untracked across 10+ commits.
notes: Must not be committed via blind git add. Separate governance decision required.
